title: W028 candidate-result intake adapter
description: Implement the first W028 evaluator-backed candidate-result intake adapter against the clean OxFml 9aca95a baseline. close_reason: Implemented first W028 candidate-result intake adapter against OxFml 9aca95a-compatible APIs. Local TreeCalc evaluation now adapts RuntimeFormulaResult.candidate_result before coordinator publication, records OxFml candidate_result_id/formula_stable_id/trace_correlation_id plus commit_attempt_id diagnostics, verifies commit candidate id matches the evaluator candidate, and keeps coordinator publication distinct. Validation passed with dirty ../OxFml path and with reversible clean-baseline redirect to ../OxFml_W028_9aca95a at 9aca95a8598124d8fc2125bd264469daeda5185f: cargo metadata resolved to clean worktree; cargo test --workspace passed. Restored src/oxcalc-core/Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock; no clean-baseline redirect remains. Scoped OxCalc fmt check passed; clippy passed with only non-fatal OxFunc dependency warning.

Temporarily redirected only src/oxcalc-core/Cargo.toml oxfml_core path to ../../../OxFml_W028_9aca95a/crates/oxfml_core. cargo metadata confirmed dependency resolution to C:\Work\DnaCalc\OxFml_W028_9aca95a\crates\oxfml_core. cargo test --workspace passed. Restored src/oxcalc-core/Cargo.toml and Cargo.lock; post-restore metadata resolves oxfml_core back to C:\Work\DnaCalc\OxFml\crates\oxfml_core; no OxFml_W028 redirect remains. No W028 adapter implementation started.

title: W028 publication/reject mapping over evaluator-backed path

close_reason: Strengthened W028 publication/reject mapping over evaluator-backed path using OxFml 9aca95a-compatible RuntimeFormulaResult commit_decision. Added accepted CommitBundle diagnostics for commit candidate id, commit_attempt_id, formula_stable_id, value-delta candidate id, and explicit coordinator_publication_authority:oxcalc marker; added RejectRecord diagnostics for reject code, formula id, optional commit id, trace correlation id, and no-publish marker; added commit bundle compatibility validation before local coordinator publication. Validation passed: scoped OxCalc fmt check, cargo test --workspace on normal path, reversible clean-baseline redirect to ../OxFml_W028_9aca95a at 9aca95a8598124d8fc2125bd264469daeda5185f with cargo metadata and cargo test --workspace, restore of Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock with no redirect remaining, and cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings with only non-fatal OxFunc dependency warning.
